title: Remove Technician Signature, Multi-Photo Upload with Labels, Rename Helper Role

requirements.text: Remove the 'Technician Signature' field entirely from the report form (ReportForm.tsx) — remove its UI input, any associated state, and all references to it in the PDF generation logic (pdfGenerator.ts).
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Technician Signature' field no longer appears in the report form UI.
No signature section appears in the generated PDF.
No residual state variables or handlers for the signature field remain in the codebase.

requirements.text: Replace the single photo upload input in ReportForm.tsx with a multi-photo upload control that allows the user to select and add multiple images. Each uploaded photo should be stored as an individual entry in state.
acceptanceCriteria: The user can select and upload more than one photo.
Each uploaded photo is stored and displayed individually.
Previously uploaded photos remain when a new one is added.

requirements.text: For each uploaded photo in the multi-photo list, provide a text input field so the user can enter a description or label for that specific photo. Store the label alongside the photo in state and include both the image and its label in the generated PDF report.

quotes: Add discription or label to each picture.

acceptanceCriteria: Each photo in the upload list has its own text input for a description or label.
The label is visually associated with its corresponding photo in the form UI.
The generated PDF displays each photo with its label rendered beneath or beside it.

requirements.text: Find all occurrences of the label 'HELPER' in the form UI (ReportForm.tsx) and the PDF generator (pdfGenerator.ts) and replace them with 'ASSIS TECHNICIAN'.
acceptanceCriteria: The label 'HELPER' no longer appears anywhere in the form UI or generated PDF.
The label 'ASSIS TECHNICIAN' appears in every place 'HELPER' previously appeared.

constraints: Do not alter any immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui).
All changes are frontend-only; do not modify backend/main.mo.
nonGoals: Adding backend storage or persistence for uploaded photos.
Changing any other field labels or form sections not mentioned in this request.
Redesigning the overall visual theme or layout of the app.
